subject: [RFC PATCH 44/45] mm: page_alloc: SPB tracepoint instrumentation [DROP-FOR-UPSTREAM]

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch introduces instrumentation for the SPB (Split Page) anti-fragmentation mechanism in the Linux kernel's page allocation code. It adds several tracepoints to track various events, such as page allocations, tainting of pages, and transitions between different migration types. The instrumentation is designed for diagnostic purposes only and can be dropped before upstream submission. The patch bundles all SPB-related tracepoint definitions and call sites into a single commit.
